issues.description: Condition should be 'HasAttachedDon' (DON!! cards on field = attached to leader), not 'HasRestingDon' (resting DON!! cards). HasRestingDon checks resting DON!!, which is a different game state.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [When Attacking] [Once Per Turn] If you have 8 or more DON!! cards on your field, draw 1 card.
